CustomField.description: Event Publish Failure Handler class name (implements IEventPublishFailureHandler). Called asynchronously in a separate transaction when platform events fail to deliver after commit. Optional - if not specified, failures are logged via System.debug only. The audit package provides UoWEventPublishFailureHandler as a default implementation. Example: UoWEventPublishFailureHandler
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Event Publish Failure Handler class name (implements IEventPublishFailureHandler). Optional - if not specified, failures are logged only.
CustomField.label: Event Publish Failure Handler Class Name
